_comment_top: Drop the 'mcpServers' block into your Claude Desktop config (Settings -> Developer -> Edit Config). Either of the two variants below works. Restart Claude Desktop after editing.

_comment_paths.windows_msix_warning: On MSIX-packaged Claude Desktop, the UI config editor can corrupt JSON. Edit the file with notepad++ / VS Code instead.

_variant_a_http_recommended._description: HTTP transport — no local process, always-up-to-date. Recommended for most users.

_variant_b_stdio_local._description: Local stdio transport — useful when behind corp proxy or for offline-cached dev.
_variant_b_stdio_local._prerequisites: git clone https://github.com/Schoasch/btc-dashboard.git && cd btc-dashboard && npm i

_tools: 44 tools across snapshots, history, on-chain series, strategy/universe catalog, insights, backtests (read + trigger), live-subscriptions, reports
_pricing: Free: 30 req/h, 200/d. API Pro EUR 9,99/mo: 300 req/h, 3k/d. API Power EUR 29,99/mo: 2000 req/h, 30k/d. One subscription covers REST + MCP.
